untranslatable_reason: Pattern geometry (descending broadening wedge identification, U-shaped vs other shapes, tall/narrow vs short/wide ratios) and gap detection require visual/structural analysis not available in indicator library. Success rates and specific measure rule calculations are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Breakout detection requires pattern recognition beyond available indicators.
translation_notes: Translated using proxies: Bollinger Bands for consolidation breakout detection, volume ratio for rising volume trend preference, and 20-period SMA for exit reversal (reasonable substitute per Rule 8). Actual DBW pattern identification, gap formation analysis, and measure-rule target calculation cannot be reliably implemented with available indicators.
